name: claude-code-refactoring-slice-review
title: claude-code-refactoring-slice-review
description: Read-only review workflow for one codebase slice produced by claude-code-refactoring-divide-and-conquer fanout, including duplicate-scavenge review when the parent workflow requests duplicate implementations or parallel custom implementations of the same concept.
